tasks.name: Add mobile hero and product preview responsive layouts

action.target: mobile hero and product preview responsive layouts

tasks.purpose: Ensure hero section stacks CTA vertically and uses fluid typography at 375px, product preview displays smaller frame on mobile

constraints: Mobile-first approach - default styles for 375px
Fluid typography with clamp() for smooth scaling
Product preview frame should be smaller on mobile (max-w-5xl → max-w-full)
Hero height should adapt: h-[90vh] → min-h-[600px] already set

tasks.input_state: Hero section displays with fixed 90vh height and centered CTA. Product preview uses ContainerScroll with large frame.
tasks.output_state: Hero section stacks CTA vertically at 375px with fluid text sizing. Product preview displays in smaller frame on mobile viewport.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: At 375px viewport, hero CTA buttons stack vertically with 44px touch targets, product preview frame uses full width with padding.

tasks.name: Convert statistics grid to 2x2 layout on mobile

action.target: statistics grid to 2x2 layout on mobile

tasks.purpose: Display statistics in 2x2 grid instead of 4-across on mobile viewports

constraints: Grid should be grid-cols-2 on mobile (<768px)
Grid should be grid-cols-4 on tablet and desktop (>=768px)
Each stat card should maintain glass card styling

tasks.input_state: Statistics section displays 4 cards in a row at all breakpoints
tasks.output_state: Statistics section displays 2x2 grid at 375px, 4-across at 768px+
tasks.acceptance_criterion: At 375px, statistics grid uses grid-cols-2. At 768px+, grid uses grid-cols-4.
tasks.verification_command: grep -n 'grid-cols-2' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/page.tsx && grep -n 'md:grid-cols-4' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Convert sticky scroll section to stacked layout on mobile

action.target: sticky scroll section to stacked layout on mobile

tasks.purpose: Transform 40/60 sticky scroll layout to vertically stacked cards on mobile viewports using useIsMobile hook

constraints: Use useIsMobile hook to detect mobile viewport
Render stacked cards on mobile (each card takes full width)
Disable sticky behavior and scroll tracking on mobile
Preserve desktop sticky scroll behavior
Maintain glass card styling

tasks.input_state: StickyScrollReveal uses 40/60 two-column layout with sticky image at all breakpoints
tasks.output_state: StickyScrollReveal displays vertically stacked full-width cards on mobile, sticky two-column layout on desktop
tasks.acceptance_criterion: At viewport <1024px, sticky scroll displays as stacked cards. At >=1024px, sticky scroll displays 40/60 layout.

tasks.name: Convert features grid to single-column layout on mobile

action.target: features grid to single-column layout on mobile

tasks.purpose: Display features in uniform single-column grid on mobile, 2-column grid on tablet

constraints: Grid should be grid-cols-1 on mobile (<640px)
Grid should be grid-cols-2 on tablet (640px-1024px)
Grid should be grid-cols-3 on desktop (>=1024px)
Use existing responsive classes: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3

tasks.input_state: Features grid uses 3-column layout at all breakpoints with responsive classes already in place
tasks.output_state: Features grid verified to display single-column on mobile, 2-column on tablet, 3-column on desktop
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Grid uses grid-cols-1 at <640px, sm:grid-cols-2 at 640px-1024px, lg:grid-cols-3 at >=1024px.
tasks.verification_command: grep -n 'grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add mobile stacked layouts for testimonials, pricing, and blog sections

action.target: mobile stacked layouts for testimonials, pricing, and blog sections

tasks.purpose: Display testimonials as single-column, pricing cards stacked vertically, blog cards as single-column on mobile

constraints: Testimonials: grid-cols-1 on mobile, sm:grid-cols-2 on tablet
Pricing: stacked vertically on mobile (overflow-x-auto currently in place)
Blog: grid-cols-1 on mobile, sm:grid-cols-2 on tablet, lg:grid-cols-3 on desktop
Pricing 'Most Popular' card should be first/visible on mobile

tasks.input_state: Testimonials, pricing, and blog sections use multi-column layouts at all breakpoints
tasks.output_state: Testimonials display single-column on mobile, 2-column on tablet. Pricing stacks vertically on mobile. Blog displays single-column on mobile.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: At 375px, testimonials, pricing cards, and blog cards stack vertically. At 768px+, testimonials and blog use 2-column grid.
tasks.verification_command: grep -n 'grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/page.tsx | wc -l && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add touch-friendly adjustments to logo cloud marquee

action.target: touch-friendly adjustments to logo cloud marquee

tasks.purpose: Ensure logo cloud marquee works well on touch devices with reduced motion support

constraints: Marquee should pause on hover (already implemented)
Touch devices should not trigger hover pause unintentionally
Respect prefers-reduced-motion by pausing animation
Ensure 44px touch targets for any interactive logos

tasks.input_state: Logo cloud marquee runs continuously with hover pause
tasks.output_state: Logo cloud marquee respects reduced motion preferences and works smoothly on touch devices
tasks.acceptance_criterion: prefers-reduced-motion pauses marquee animation. Touch interactions don't conflict with scroll.

tasks.name: Audit all interactive elements for 44px minimum touch targets

action.target: all interactive elements for 44px minimum touch targets

tasks.purpose: Verify all CTAs, buttons, and interactive elements have minimum 44px touch targets for accessibility

constraints: All buttons must have min-h-[44px] or min-w-[44px] depending on orientation
All links must have minimum 44px touch target (including padding)
Icon-only buttons must have min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px]
Use Tailwind utility classes for touch targets

tasks.input_state: Interactive elements may have inconsistent touch target sizes
tasks.output_state: All interactive elements verified to have minimum 44px touch targets with documented violations fixed
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All buttons and links on homepage have minimum 44px touch targets. No touch targets below 44px found.

tasks.name: Test all three breakpoints and verify no horizontal scrolling

action.target: all three breakpoints and verify no horizontal scrolling

tasks.purpose: Perform end-to-end testing at 375px (mobile), 768px (tablet), and 1280px (desktop) viewports to verify responsive layouts and no horizontal scrolling

dependencies: All responsive layout changes from T1-T7
constraints: Test at exactly 375px, 768px, and 1280px widths
Verify no horizontal scrollbar at any breakpoint
Verify all 12 sections render correctly at each breakpoint
Document any layout issues found
Verify text remains readable without zooming

tasks.input_state: All responsive layout changes implemented but not tested end-to-end
tasks.output_state: All breakpoints tested and verified. No horizontal scrolling. All sections render correctly.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Homepage renders correctly at 375px, 768px, and 1280px with no horizontal scrolling and readable text.
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web build && echo 'Manual testing required: Test at 375px, 768px, 1280px viewports' && pnpm typecheck
